---
title: "`r params$title`"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
params:
  title: "RNAdetector Analysis Report"
  pipeline_version: "2.0"
  analysis_type: "long_rna"
  algorithm: "star"
  counting_algorithm: "featurecounts"
  de_algorithm: "deseq2"
  genome_name: "Human (hg38)"
  annotation_name: "GENCODE v38"
  threads: 4
  memory_gb: 8
  trim_enabled: true
  trim_quality: 20
  trim_length: 50
  output_dir: "."
  job_name: "RNAdetector_analysis"
  input_files: ""
  pathway_analysis: false
  circ_rna_detection: false
  circ_algorithm: "ciri2"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 4
    theme: darkly
    highlight: monokai
    code_folding: show
    self_contained: true
    number_sections: true
bibliography: references.bib
csl: nature.csl
---

```{css custom-dark-theme, echo=TRUE}
/* Custom CSS for enhanced dark theme readability */
body {
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
  line-height: 1.7;
}
body p {
  text-align: justify;
}
table {
  width: 100%;
  margin-bottom: 1em;
}
.table-striped > tbody > tr:nth-of-type(odd) {
  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
}
pre {
  border: 1px solid #444;
}
```

```{r setup, echo=TRUE}
# Load required libraries
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(knitr)
  library(DT)
})

# Set global chunk options: all code is displayed with echo=TRUE
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Analysis Summary {.tabset}

## Pipeline Parameters

```{r parameters-table, echo=TRUE}
# Build a summary table of all analysis parameters used in this run
param_df <- data.frame(
  Parameter = c(
    "Pipeline Version",
    "Analysis Type",
    "Job Name",
    "Alignment Algorithm",
    "Counting Algorithm",
    "DE Algorithm",
    "Reference Genome",
    "Annotation",
    "Threads",
    "Memory (GB)",
    "Trimming Enabled",
    "Trim Quality Threshold",
    "Trim Minimum Length"
  ),
  Value = c(
    params$pipeline_version,
    params$analysis_type,
    params$job_name,
    params$algorithm,
    params$counting_algorithm,
    ifelse(is.null(params$de_algorithm), "none", params$de_algorithm),
    params$genome_name,
    params$annotation_name,
    params$threads,
    ifelse(is.null(params$memory_gb), "N/A", params$memory_gb),
    ifelse(params$trim_enabled, "Yes", "No"),
    ifelse(params$trim_enabled, params$trim_quality, "N/A"),
    ifelse(params$trim_enabled, params$trim_length, "N/A")
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Display the parameters table
kable(param_df, format = "html", caption = "Analysis Parameters") |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                            full_width = FALSE)
```

## Input Files

```{r input-files, echo=TRUE}
# List the input files used in this analysis
if (params$input_files != "") {
  input_list <- unlist(strsplit(params$input_files, ","))
  cat("**Number of input files:**", length(input_list), "\n\n")
  for (f in input_list) {
    cat("-", trimws(f), "\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("No input files specified in parameters.\n")
}
```

# Materials and Methods

```{r materials-methods, child='materials_methods.Rmd', echo=TRUE}
# The Materials and Methods section is generated from a parameterized child document.
# This child document dynamically constructs publication-ready text
# based on the analysis parameters (alignment tool, counting method, DE method, etc.).
```

# Quality Control

```{r qc-section, echo=TRUE}
# Quality control plots and metrics placeholder.
# This section is populated with QC data when available from the pipeline output.
cat("Quality control metrics will be displayed here when QC data is available.\n")
cat("Typical QC metrics include:\n")
cat("- Per-base sequence quality scores\n")
cat("- Read length distribution\n")
cat("- GC content distribution\n")
cat("- Adapter contamination levels\n")
cat("- Alignment rate statistics\n")
```

```{r qc-alignment-stats, echo=TRUE}
# Attempt to load alignment statistics if available
alignment_stats_file <- file.path(params$output_dir, "alignment_stats.txt")
if (file.exists(alignment_stats_file)) {
  alignment_stats <- read.delim(alignment_stats_file, header = TRUE)
  kable(alignment_stats, format = "html", caption = "Alignment Statistics") |>
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"))
} else {
  cat("Alignment statistics file not found at:", alignment_stats_file, "\n")
}
```

# Results

```{r results-section, echo=TRUE}
# Results placeholder section.
# Specific report types (long_rna_report.Rmd, small_rna_report.Rmd, circ_rna_report.Rmd)
# provide detailed results tailored to the analysis type.
cat("Detailed results are provided in the analysis-specific report sections.\n")
cat("Analysis type:", params$analysis_type, "\n")
```

# Software Versions

```{r software-versions, echo=TRUE}
# Compile a table of software tools and versions used in this analysis
software_df <- data.frame(
  Software = c(
    "RNAdetector",
    "R",
    "Bioconductor"
  ),
  Version = c(
    params$pipeline_version,
    paste(R.version$major, R.version$minor, sep = "."),
    as.character(BiocManager::version())
  ),
  Reference = c(
    "Alaimo et al., 2020",
    "R Core Team, 2023",
    "Huber et al., 2015"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Add alignment tool version
if (params$algorithm == "star") {
  software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(
    Software = "STAR", Version = "2.7.9a", Reference = "Dobin et al., 2013"))
} else if (params$algorithm == "hisat2") {
  software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(
    Software = "HISAT2", Version = "2.2.1", Reference = "Kim et al., 2019"))
} else if (params$algorithm == "salmon") {
  software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(
    Software = "Salmon", Version = "1.5.2", Reference = "Patro et al., 2017"))
} else if (params$algorithm == "bwa") {
  software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(
    Software = "BWA", Version = "0.7.17", Reference = "Li & Durbin, 2009"))
}

# Add counting tool version
if (params$counting_algorithm == "featurecounts") {
  software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(
    Software = "featureCounts (Subread)", Version = "2.0.3", Reference = "Liao et al., 2014"))
} else if (params$counting_algorithm == "htseq") {
  software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(
    Software = "HTSeq", Version = "0.13.5", Reference = "Anders et al., 2015"))
} else if (params$counting_algorithm == "stringtie") {
  software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(
    Software = "StringTie", Version = "2.1.7", Reference = "Pertea et al., 2015"))
}

# Add DE tool version
if (!is.null(params$de_algorithm) && params$de_algorithm != "none") {
  if (params$de_algorithm == "deseq2") {
    software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(
      Software = "DESeq2", Version = "1.34.0", Reference = "Love et al., 2014"))
  } else if (params$de_algorithm == "edger") {
    software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(
      Software = "edgeR", Version = "3.36.0", Reference = "Robinson et al., 2010"))
  } else if (params$de_algorithm == "limma_voom") {
    software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(
      Software = "limma-voom", Version = "3.50.0", Reference = "Ritchie et al., 2015"))
  }
}

# Add trimming tool if enabled
if (params$trim_enabled) {
  software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(
    Software = "Trim Galore", Version = "0.6.6", Reference = "Krueger, 2015"))
}

# Display the software versions table
kable(software_df, format = "html", caption = "Software Versions Used in This Analysis") |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                            full_width = FALSE)
```

# Session Information

```{r session-info, echo=TRUE}
# Print the full R session information for reproducibility
sessionInfo()
```

# References
